title: Charak Pharma South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Charak Pharma South Asia Partners is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Tiruchirappalli. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Charak Pharma South Asia Partners:
Charak Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma South Asia Partners!
